objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: trend_supertrend
archetype: trend_supertrend
family: trend
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- supertrend(atr_period=14, multiplier=2.0)
- adx(period=13)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: supertrend.direction == 1 and adx.adx > 30
- short: supertrend.direction == -1 and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: direction_change(supertrend.direction) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.75
tp_atr_mult: 2.0
description: ATR trailing stop (1.75x) and take-profit (2.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: A combination of Supertrend, ADX and ATR provides a robust trend-following strategy with risk management.
A combination of Supertrend, ADX and ATR provides a robust trend following strategy with trailing stop loss and take profit.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is based on three widely used indicators, Supertrend, ADX and ATR. It combines their strengths to generate buy/sell signals with trailing stop loss and take profit. The strategy uses a combination of no lookahead and only registry indicators which can help enhance its robustness.
[Backup plan] If the results are poor (negative return), we will try adjusting parameters such as period, multiplier for ATR and Supertrend. We would also consider using different combinations of indicators or even other trend following strategies if this one fails to produce satisfactory returns.

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy will outperform the market because it uses a combination of sophisticated algorithms and cutting-edge technology.
